name: Tiny city
description:
A modern day city, but tiny. Are we shrunk? Or are you a big giant or giantess?. It is a tiny but big city of millions of inhabitants, with all kinds of buildings and neighborhoods. It has shopping, educational, sports and leisure centers, good roads, highways and a train.

For an inhabitant of the tiny city a giant people is 40 to 50 feet tall and has a habit of wrecking and carrying people away against their will.

For a giant people the inhabitants are between 9 and 10 inches tall and it is wonderful to walk through its streets, look inside the houses and buildings, step on cars, or little people, and take some of them away as toys never to be heard from again.
creator: Cobaltina_real
